title: Investigation State
description: Last-entered phase, family, and iteration — the investigation checkpoint. The phase field reflects what was last entered; it is not updated as artifacts are written within a phase. Operators wanting fine-grained progress should watch the iteration artifact directory's mtimes (#236).

last_entered_phase.description: The last phase the engine entered (#236). NOT necessarily the currently active phase — artifact writes within a phase do not update this field, so during a long phase you'll see the entry-time value linger even though the phase is well underway. Renamed from `phase` in #236 so its semantics aren't conflated with 'currently active phase.' Pre-#236 state.json files used the key `phase` instead; ``orchestrator.engine`` accepts those for backward compat (in-flight runs) and migrates them to this key on the next save, but the schema only describes the canonical post-#236 shape. PRE_WORK (#167) is an opt-in cheap-exploration phase between INIT and DESIGN. CRITIC (#87) is an opt-in falsifiability check between DESIGN and HUMAN_DESIGN_GATE.

family.description: Current mechanism family under investigation, null before design.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last state update.

config_ref.description: Path to the campaign configuration file (campaign.yaml). Null before setup.
